candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line shown separately at the same level as Production costs, so it does not appear embedded within the selected COGS row. However, the label is a company-wide operating D&A total rather than a COGS-specific D&A row, so assigning it to COGS alone risks misallocation/double counting versus SG&A-related D&A.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A line exists above financial items, but it is not labeled as COGS-specific. Because the same total likely spans production and overhead/R&D buckets, conservatively do not assign it to COGS without manual allocation support.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line shown separately from Other operating expenses, Research & Development Expense, and Administrative expenses, so it does not appear embedded within the selected XSGA component rows. However, the label is a combined operating D&A total rather than an SG&A-specific row, so assigning it to XSGA alone risks misallocation/double counting versus COGS-related D&A.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A line exists above financial items, but it is not labeled as SG&A-specific. Since Research & Development Expense is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, and the available D&A row is only a combined total, conservatively leave unassigned pending manual review.
